title: Central Park Zoo (New York) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: # Central Park Zoo. 5. ## Central Park Zoo and its collection. The Central Park Zoo, nestled within the heart of New York City's Central Park, is a well-managed establishment under the care of the Wildlife Conservation Society (WCS). This location offers a unique opportunity for visitors to experience a diverse range of wildlife in the midst of a bustling city. ### Animal Diversity at Central Park Zoo. The Central Park Zoo is home to a wide variety of animals from both tropical and polar regions of the earth. ### Petting Zoo at Central Park Zoo.
